headline: Tesla driver faces manslaughter charges over Texas crash that killed a woman inside her home
summary: A Tesla driver faces manslaughter charges after a fatal crash in Texas. His Model 3 struck and killed a woman inside her home. The driver claimed to be using Tesla's Full-Self Driving (FSD) system.

headline: Meta has a new app called Pocket that is absolutely nothing like the old Pocket
summary: Meta launched a new AI-focused app named Pocket. It's distinct from Mozilla's retired read-it-later Pocket app. The app allows users to create and share interactive 'gizmos' from AI prompts.

headline: The best July 4th sales we found so far
summary: Many July 4th sales are still active despite Prime Day being over. These deals often preview mid-July sales events. Look out for discounts from major retailers like Best Buy.

headline: Weber marks down grills and griddles to their best prices ever for July 4th
summary: Weber is offering significant discounts on grills and griddles for July 4th. Many items are at their lowest prices ever. Sales include a variety of models, smokers, and accessories.

headline: Neuroscape Is the *Other* Cyberpunk TCG, and So Far It’s Quite Fun | IGN Preview
summary: IGN offers a hands-on preview of Neuroscape TCG. The game is described as a promising cyberpunk-themed collectible card game. It's a recent Kickstarter success story.

headline: Moana 3 Is in the Works, According to The Rock
summary: Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson confirms Moana 3 is in development. The highly anticipated Disney sequel is officially moving forward. Further details on the film are expected.

headline: 'It's Not a Comedy' — Danny McBride Details New G.I. Joe Movie, Aiming to Film in 2027
summary: Danny McBride shares first details on his upcoming G.I. Joe movie. He confirms the film will not be a comedy. Production is tentatively set to begin in 2027.

headline: Razer Iskur V2 NewGen Review
summary: A review of the Razer Iskur V2 NewGen gaming chair is available. The article evaluates its features, comfort, and performance. It provides insights for potential buyers.

headline: Married at First Sight UK star arrested on suspicion of rape
summary: A Married at First Sight UK star has been arrested. The arrest is on suspicion of rape. This follows a BBC Panorama investigation into the reality show.

headline: Boys who raped teen girls given custodial sentences
summary: Two teenage boys convicted of rape received custodial sentences. They had initially been given non-custodial sentences. The decision follows legal review of their case.

headline: Pubs allowed to stay open until 5am for England Mexico match
summary: Pubs in England can now stay open until 5 AM for the Mexico match. The government relaxed licensing laws for this specific game. This decision reverses an earlier stance against further World Cup extensions.

headline: Sabrina Carpenter and Graham Norton spotted in NYC before rumoured Swift wedding celebrations
summary: Celebrities like Sabrina Carpenter and Graham Norton were seen in NYC. Their appearance fuels rumors of Taylor Swift's wedding celebrations. Madison Square Garden is speculated as the venue for the event.
